experiment: CAR vs Lookup — Same Corpus, Two Query Modes
mode1_description: Full disclosure text as query (known-anchor / Shepardizing setting)
mode2_description: Llama-generated free-form NL query, no CVE ID (CAR setting)

osv_dev.note: Mode-2 TCA is 0 because free-form NL queries contain no CVE ID (not applicable)

entity_probe.note: Applicable only when both product name AND CVE ID appear in the query text

key_finding: Lookup tools (OSV.dev, entity probe) achieve TCA=0.006/0.000 in Mode-1 but are 0%/0% applicable in Mode-2. Two-Stage achieves TCA=0.975 in Mode-2, the only system that works without the anchor entity in the query.
